#  Forward an RFI by Email 
##  Background 
The built-in email functionality in the RFIs tool gives you the ability to forward an RFI to other project users by email. This gives those users the ability to view the RFI.  
**_Important!_** If you want to forward an RFI to another user for the purpose of reviewing and submitting a response to the RFI, see [Forward an RFI for Review](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/forward-an-rfi-for-review).
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * **_Important!_** If you want to forward an RFI to another user for the purpose of reviewing and submitting a reply to an RFI, see [Forward an RFI for Review](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/forward-an-rfi-for-review).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool.
  2. Locate the desired RFI in the list. Then click **View**.
  3. Click the vertical ellipsis![Vertical Ellipsis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eae0d80de267eed59250c0d618844ddf/c2f7785c278d34217a4ac59f376864bc/vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp)at the top of the page.
  4. Click **Email**.
  5. Set user access to the message as follows:
     * To restrict access to this message, mark the **Private** checkbox. Private emails are only shown to recipients and the sender of the email.
  6. Add your desired recipients in the **To or** **CC** fields.  
**Note:** As the sender, your profile's email address is automatically added to the CC field.
  7. In the **Subject** box, accept the default subject line or write your own.
  8. In the **Message** box, type your desired message. This field corresponds to the body of the email message.
  9. Click the **Attach Files** button to attach any relevant files or items to the message.
  10. Click **Send**.


## See Also
  * [When do the download links in emails sent from Procore expire?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-do-the-download-links-in-emails-sent-from-procore-expire)
  * [Add Assignees to an RFI as an Assignee on an RFI](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/add-assignees-to-an-rfi-as-an-assignee-on-an-rfi)
  * [Shift the Ball In Court on an RFI](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/shift-the-ball-in-court-on-an-rfi)
title: Forward an RFI by Email
description: How to forward and RFI by email using the Project level RFIs tool.
